_comment: SETUP REQUIREMENT: before importing this file for the company under test, a Worker row with nationalId '009000068' must already exist under a DIFFERENT company (any other companyId). Importing this file for a company that is NOT that worker's own company must then fail this row with the v4 cross-company-conflict error (CsvImportService.importRow's own CsvFieldError('national_id', ...) check), never reassign the worker.
call: CsvImportService.importCsv(csvText, companyUnderTestId) -- after seeding nationalId 009000068 under a DIFFERENT company

setup.note: seed a worker with this nationalId under some other companyId before running the import
